summary: Wave 17 Rollout & Cleanup complete (v4.0.0 released, 12 sprints delivered, legacy removed). DEVFLOW memory refactor phase 6 completed (lifecycle documented). Wave H0 planning & spec complete. Wave H1 (Workspaces + Turbo) implemented and merged to main.
anti_patterns_triggered: AP-094 (Reference handler in useEffect before declaration)
AP-095 (Skip local quality gates before push)
AP-096 (CSS Deletion Without Verifying className Usage)
key_lessons: Wave 17 (Redesign Rollout) required 12 sequential sprints. Feature flag infrastructure enabled safe rollback despite delivery complexity.
R-010 (Hook Order) violations cause runtime TDZ crashes, not just style issues. Critical to test locally before push.
Static analysis (grep imports) insufficient for CSS safety. Must grep both imports AND className usage.
Landing.css regression (AP-096) discovered at runtime; initial grep missed className-based styling. Restored file and fixed in a8667c6.
DEVFLOW memory refactor phase 6: lifecycle (hot/warm/cold/archived) explicitly documented. Enables better Bootstrap decisions.
Wave H1 (Workspaces) successfully created modular structure without breaking web app. Retrocompatibility achieved 100%.
Gemini Code Assist review of H1 PR #458: 0 issues found, approved for merge. Wave H1 integration validated.
distillation_notes: Journal contains 15 entries (W09-W15): 3 distillations, 21 feature/fix/refactor events, 3+ concurrent waves.
Rules applied consistently (R-001, R-002, R-003 appear in every session). Hot rules are universal guardrails.
AP-094 + AP-095 created in S17.6 to prevent recurrence of TDZ + quality gate bypass. AP-096 created in S17.9.
No rules proposed for archival or promotion in this period. All active rules continue operational.
Global base export completed in Wave 7 (2026-04-08). No new exports pending.

quality_metrics.pr_gemini_reviews: 4 PRs reviewed, 0-3 issues per PR, all resolved before merge

next_actions: Wave H2 planning (Core Pure extraction from src/schemas and src/utils into packages/core)
Potential gene mutation proposal: review `memory_distillation_threshold` (currently 10, could be 15 based on recent cycles)
Monitor AP-094, AP-095, AP-096 trigger counts over next 5 sessions for lifecycle decisions
